title: ocimum fimbriatum var. bequaertii
intro: Ocimum fimbriatum var. bequaertii, also known as African basil, is a variety of Ocimum fimbriatum that is native to the tropical regions of Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Ocimum fimbriatum var. bequaertii include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as having antioxidant and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to relieve symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
